headline: Starbucks South Korea Backlash Tests International Growth And Governance Controls
summary: Starbucks, NasdaqGS:SBUX, has been hit by a public backlash in South Korea after a marketing campaign tied to the Gwangju Uprising anniversary. The controversy has been followed by a reported decline in sales in the country and a rare global apology from leadership. Executives linked to the campaign have been dismissed and the company has launched an internal investigation into how it was approved. The incident highlights reputational and operational risks for Starbucks in one of its key...
